Interface IDescTable

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a descriptor table.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("D777C1A0-F41A-11D2-80A7-00500462E955")]
public interface IDescTable

BinFunction

Pixel to Row tranlator.

IBinFunction BinFunction { get; }

IBinFunction
